heading: Authority to issue search warrant—(Rule)
label: 3102 Authority to issue search warrant—(Rule)
notes: See Federal Rules of Criminal ProcedureFederal, State or Territorial Judges, or U.S. magistrate judges authorized to issue search warrants, Rule 41(a).
